artPrompt: An evocative scene of a back room where stacks of glinting coins and tokens multiply endlessly across a card table, doubling and spilling onto the floor in mounting tides, while a wide-eyed goblin clutches a crumpled scrap and watches the pile devour the room. A single amber lamp glows above the swelling hoard, smoke curling. Mono-black noir of ink shadow and smoky brown, runaway compounding dread, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: The Vig Compounds Forever
text:
At the beginning of each player's upkeep, double the number of Favor tokens you control. (Two becomes four, four becomes eight, eight becomes — keep going, it's fine, the table will wait.)
Whenever you would lose the game, instead sacrifice that many Favor tokens. You cannot, mathematically, run out before they do.
flavorText: Compound interest is the most powerful force in the underworld. The Don read that on a poster and never recovered.
